ticket.title: CONFIGURE EVENTBRIDGE CRON JOB FOR NIGHTLY QUICKBOOKS CUSTOMER SYNC

test_cases.description: Verify that manually triggering the batch sync endpoint correctly pushes an updated field (e.g., company name) to the matching QuickBooks customer, per dev's provided Postman test steps.
test_cases.expected_result: The QuickBooks customer record updates to match the new value set in LakbayHub after the batch sync call.
test_cases.actual_result: API response confirmed batch sync completed with 6 users updated, 0 errors. Verified in QuickBooks that field values matched the changes made in LakbayHub.

test_cases.description: Verify that only users updated/created on or after the 'since' date are included in the batch sync.
test_cases.expected_result: Only users updated on/after the 'since' date are synced/updated in QuickBooks; untouched users are not affected by this run.
test_cases.actual_result: All 6 returned users matched the actual set of users updated that day. No unrelated/untouched users were included.

test_cases.description: Verify the endpoint properly rejects requests without a valid x-api-key.
test_cases.expected_result: Request is rejected with an appropriate authentication error (e.g., 401/403); no sync is triggered.
test_cases.actual_result: Request without a valid x-api-key was rejected as expected.

test_cases.description: Verify that calling the batch sync endpoint multiple times with overlapping 'since' ranges does not create duplicate QuickBooks records.
test_cases.expected_result: No duplicate customer record is created; the existing record is updated (if changed) or left as-is.
test_cases.actual_result: No duplicate records created on repeated manual trigger.

test_cases.description: Verify that the EventBridge cron job runs automatically overnight without manual triggering, by checking for evidence of an automatic sync the next day.
test_cases.expected_result: The QuickBooks record reflects the update automatically the next day, confirming the cron job ran overnight as configured, without any manual Postman call.
test_cases.comments: Indirect verification only - QA has no AWS/EventBridge access to confirm the schedule config directly. Awaiting next-day check against untouched update.

test_cases.description: Verify that if multiple users are updated in a single day, all are correctly picked up and synced in one batch run.
test_cases.expected_result: All updated users are reflected correctly in QuickBooks after a single batch sync call - no user is skipped or missed.
test_cases.actual_result: All 6 updated users for the day were correctly synced in a single batch call.
